bullets: Officially licensed Spyro 2: Classic Ripto's Rage collectible statue — Standard Edition
Pose and base directly inspired by the official Spyro 2: Classic Ripto's Rage video game cover
Head tilt, raised right paw, and forward lean all match the iconic cover art
Base features grassy terrain on fire, recreating the game cover environment
content.description: The concept for this statue is inspired by the official cover of the classic Spyro 2: Classic Ripto's Rage video game, from the pose of Spyro down to the design of the PVC base. The tilt of Spyro's head, his right paw up, the slight lean forward, the grassy terrain on fire that Spyro is standing on, and everything in between all directly matches the official video game cover the statue is based on!

attributes.whats_in_box:
• Spyro 2: Classic Ripto's Rage PVC painted statue
• Highly detailed PVC base inspired by the Spyro the Dragon art style
• Collectors Box containing F4F Leaflet with 500 F4F reward points included
